About Me

Analyst who turns numbers into stories

I am a data analytics professional with hands-on experience in Tableau, SQL and Excel. I build dashboards that help businesses make faster, smarter decisions — whether that is tracking sales, understanding customers, or measuring employee performance.

"I don't just build charts — I answer the questions your business is actually asking."

My 5 projects span retail, HR, aviation, FMCG, and real estate — proving I can work across industries and turn any dataset into a clear, actionable insight.

Portfolio

5 Real Dashboards. 5 Business Questions.

Every project starts with a real problem. Here is what I discovered.

Tableau Sales Analytics
Project 01

Global Superstore — Sales & Profit Overview

Retail data across Furniture, Technology & Office Supplies. Business question: "Which products make money — and which ones drain it?"

Key Findings
Phones top at $1.7M vs Labels at $73K — massive product gap identified
South region has -4% profit ratio — it is losing money and needs urgent action
Cubify 3D Printer loses $8,880 — flagged for immediate pricing review
View Live on Tableau ↗
Tableau HR Analytics
Project 02

HR Dashboard — Awesome Chocolates

Employee data: salaries, ages, genders, leave balances & hiring history (2017–2023). Business question: "Are we paying fairly, and who might burn out?"

Key Findings
Master’s holders earn noticeably more — education pay gap proven with data
Sales & Marketing have the highest unused leave — burnout risk flagged
Company grew from 8 to 88 employees in 6 years — strong, steady growth
View Live on Tableau ↗
Tableau Sentiment Analysis
Project 03

British Airways — Passenger Review Analysis

7 years of passenger reviews across 7 service metrics. Business question: "Where is British Airways failing its customers the most?"

Key Findings
Entertainment scores just 1.2/10 — the single biggest failure across all 7 metrics
Ratings visibly dipped around 2020 — COVID impact on service quality captured
Boeing 747 rated 8.0, A380 rated 1.0 — older aircraft outperforms the newer one
View Live on Tableau ↗
Tableau Sales Summary
Project 04

Chocolate Sales — Global Business Summary

$1M+ revenue across 6 countries, 178 shipments, top 10 salespeople. Business question: "Which markets and people are driving our business?"

Key Findings
$1,051,792 total revenue across 30,265 boxes — executive KPIs at a glance
Australia leads in volume; UK shows strongest per-shipment value
Top 3 reps each exceed $65K — clear star performers worth retaining
View Live on Tableau ↗
Tableau Real Estate
Project 05

Airbnb Seattle — Pricing & Revenue Analysis

Airbnb listing data for Seattle — prices by bedroom, neighbourhood maps, listing volumes & 2016 revenue trend. Business question: "Where and how should a host list to earn the most?"

Key Findings
6-bedroom listings earn $585/night — 6x more than 1-bedroom at $96
Zip code 98119 commands Seattle’s highest nightly price at $200+
Revenue doubled from $1M to $2M+ across 2016 — strong seasonal growth curve
View Live on Tableau ↗
